title: Assessment Output
description: Output format for a completed or in-progress assessment. Contains metadata and answers. Instance IDs use the format 'taskId' (non-repeatable) or 'taskId[index]' (repeatable, zero-based). The URN in metadata identifies the assessment definition and version.

$schema.description: Reference to the JSON Schema that describes this output format

metadata.description: Output metadata including URN identifier of the assessment definition

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this output was created

urn.description: URN identifier of the assessment definition including version (e.g. 'urn:nl:dpia:3.0'). Composed from the definition's urn + version fields.

createdBy.description: User who created this export (optional, for audit exports)

completedTasks.description: IDs of tasks marked as completed by the user (e.g. ['0', '1', '3']). Only present when at least one task is completed.

answers.description: User answers keyed by instance ID (e.g. '2.1.3' or '2.1.1[0]')

instanceId.description: Task instance identifier. Non-repeatable: 'taskId' (e.g. '2.1.3'). Repeatable: 'taskId[index]' (e.g. '2.1.1[0]'). Index is zero-based.

answer.description: A single answer value with metadata

value.description: The answer value. Type depends on the field: string for text/date/radio, string[] for checkboxes, null for cleared answers.

lastEditedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this answer was last modified

lastEditedBy.description: Display name of the user who last edited this answer (optional, for audit exports)
